# Vishal Singh

> Blockchain-Cryptography Security Researcher focused on **ZK systems, smart contracts, and blockchain protocol security**. Available for private audits and competitive auditing.

## Credentials & Background

- **Security researcher:** Private audits since Q4 2024, competitive audits since Q1 2024
- **Platforms:** Code4rena, Sherlock, Cantina, Codehawks
- **Previous roles:**
  - Blockchain Developer (Q2 2023 - Q3 2023)
  - Software Developer (AI/Web-dev) (Q2 2021 - Q1 2023)
- **Education:**
  - Bachelor's of Technology in Electronics & Communication Engineering
  - Bachelor's of Science in Computer Science

## Top Competition Rankings

- **RadicalxChange** - 3rd Rank: Highest bidder can withdraw his collateral due to a missing check in _cancelAllBids
- **Sorella Angstrom** - 4th Rank (10xCrit-Patrol team): Fees can be stolen by changing the initialized ticks
- **Geneius Contracts** - 6th Rank: DoS in Solana via order_hash collision during filling orders
- **Nitro-Labs/Solaxy** - 8th Rank: Stale owner index lets attackers create "ghost" programs and exhaust resources
- **Napier** - 9th Rank: Loss of funds due to not collecting fees
- **FarcasterAttestation** - 16th Rank: The lack of ERC-165 compliance leads to integration failures

## Research & Resources

- **[Cairo-Security-Checklist](https://this-vishalsingh.github.io/blog/cairo-security-checklist/):** Vulnerability checklist for Cairo and Starknet
- **[zkVM-Security](https://github.com/this-vishalsingh/zkVM-Security):** Zero-Knowledge Virtual Machine security research
- **[FHE-Security](https://github.com/this-vishalsingh/FHE-Security):** Fully Homomorphic Encryption security research
- **[ZippelLabs](https://zippellabs.github.io/):** Advanced cryptographic systems research and [ZP1](https://github.com/ZippelLabs/ZP1) zkVM development.
